name: future-agi
description: Open-source, end-to-end platform for evaluating, observing, and improving LLM and AI agent applications. Tracing · Evals · Simulations · Datasets · Gateway · Guardrails. Self-hostable. Apache 2.0.

name: stash
description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required.

name: LoongForge
description: A modular, scalable, and highly efficient training framework for language, multimodal, and embodied models.

name: axi-front-design-skill
description: 帮你做 PPT、落地页、产品动效和交互原型的 Skill。——by 阿西_出海

name: teenycode
description: A tiny coding agent in under 200 LOC

name: claude-comstyle
description: 13 prompts to control how Claude communicates — choose your style, cut the noise.

name: claude-history-manager
description: A native macOS browser for your Claude Code session history. Search, pin, tag, resume sessions in any terminal. Transcripts stay on your Mac.

name: smart-rename
description: Right-click any file in Finder → AI gives it a meaningful name. Images, videos, PDFs, Word, Markdown, folders. macOS native, BYOK Gemini, MIT.

name: awesome-website-prompts-and-skills
description: Tencent EdgeOne 维护的网站资源合集。在 AI 编程工具中，给它一个 Prompt 或 Skill，就能生成精美酷炫的网页，或者带有登录、支付、AI 能力的完整网站。WorkBuddy × Tencent EdgeOne AI Prompts × Skills 挑战赛官方作品池。
